productDisplayName: Vishudh Women Cotton Silk Green Kurtas
description: Composition Green and mustard yellow woven kurta made of cotton and silk blend fabric, that has a green printed panel on the front and on the sleeves, mega sleeves, mandarin collar with a slit neckline and brocade paneling on the collar and on the upper bust Fitting Slim Wash care Hand wash separately as colour may bleed Use mild detergent Do not dry in direct sunlight Do not bleach Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Use warm iron Upgrade your casual look with this chic kurta from vishudh! The green and mustard yellow fabric and the brocade detailing adds a festive touch grey kurta, while the cotton and silk blend fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day long. Team it with leggings or a white loose kameez and gold sandals for a chilled out look. Model Statistics The model wears size M in kurtas Height-5.7", Chest-33"
